turns.user_message: I tried to calm myself down, but it didn't really work. I still feel this low hum of worry in my chest.
I keep trying to shake it off, but the feeling just comes right back. It's like my own thoughts are working against me.
I'm starting to wonder if I should talk to someone, because I can't manage this on my own. Everything feels like it's just piling up.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
